AI-powered Data Solution

Interactive Data Quality, Aggregation, Analytics, and Reporting for Financial Institutions

Get a demo
You’re in safe hands – Meet some of our customers.

An example of how Opensee works in the risk data journey

Check out our latest awards from financial industry analysts and experts

Opensee once again a Category Leader in Chartis RiskTech Quadrants

Chartis Research ranks Opensee as a category leader in Risk Data Aggregation and Sell-side Enterprise Market Risk in their 2024 Enterprise Market Risk Solutions report.

Learn more

AI-powered solutions for your most complex data challenges

Fusing financial and technology expertise, Opensee delivers solutions for critical data-intensive use cases.

Market risk

Explore the most granular & historical level of trade data in real-time and run simulations on your P&L.

Find out more

Credit risk

Analyze your Credit Portfolio exposures & track misbookings to manage your risks more accurately.

Find out more

Liquidity & ALM risk

Understand stress testing & analyse cash flows and simulate ALM exposures more accurately.

Find out more

Trade analytics

Leverage historical trading & market activity to generate trading intelligence through real-time analytics.

Find out more

Collateral management

Analyse & manage collateral requirements in real-time to optimise allocation with direct leverage.

Find out more

ESG risk

Perform climate-related analysis & react quicker to evolving regulations like taxonomy requirements.

Find out more

Buy-Side Risk and Liquidity Analytics

Delivering real-time data management, risk analytics, and AI-driven decision-making, redefining what's possible for hedge funds and asset managers.

Find out more

Access & analyze
unprecedented
volumes of data.

Opensee leverages advanced AI technologies to streamline your data journey, integrating ingestion, quality monitoring, storage, aggregation, calculations, and simulations into a unified, intelligent platform.

Your business challenges
Your solutions with Opensee

① Limited data accessibility

Real-time access to 100% of your data at the most granular level with no compromise on speed nor on volume and history.

② Accurate and timely analysis & reporting

Leverage multi-dimensional analytics with embedded AI for data quality and exploration.

③ Seeing impact of adjustments

Immediately see the impact of adjustments (trade details, metrics monitoring, capital consumption…) with full auditability and traceability.

④ Lack of explainability

Achieve actionable explainability, deeply understanding and leveraging your data for backtesting, scenario analysis, and intraday decision-making.

⑤ Too many compromises

With Opensee, there are no more compromises. Get unbeatable access, performance, quality, and cost.

⑥ High Total Cost of Ownership

Leverage natively scalable disk technology with low/no-code access.
Show more
Show less

See how teams use Opensee

Risk/Treasury users
Traders
Tech / IT
Quants

Access and analyze all of your data in real-time

Centralize huge volumes of fragmented data, run complex calculations, and create reports to protect your business and make better, faster decisions.

  • Easily aggregate any volume of fragmented data

  • Consume and analyze data on your own terms

  • Explain all of your data at a controlled cost

Get a demo

Generate pre- and post-trade intelligence through real-time analytics

Take control of a complex trading ecosystem and improve trade performance and execution at controlled costs.

  • Easily connect all of your data sources

  • Access all of your data from one place

  • Analyze data across any dimension at controlled costs

Get a demo

Give your teams the tools they need to execute flawlessly

Let Opensee handle the heavy lifting when it comes to real-time data aggregation, modeling, and calculations, with our integrated self-service data management and analytics.

  • Ensure fast time to market

  • Leverage our ready-to-use solutions for many use cases

  • Improve performance at a lower cost

Get a demo

Calculate and simulate billions of data points on the fly

Aggregate, calculate, and simulate billions of data points on the fly using our native Python integration.

  • Build your models (capital, AI…)  on the same data as the end users

  • Test and modify the models on the fly

  • Deploy directly to end users

Get a demo

Hear it from
our customers.

"This is a game changer for the bank in terms of improving the speed, efficiency and governance of risk management for Crédit Agricole CIB’s market activities."

"Opensee brought a cutting-edge solution that combines the transformative use of technology with financial markets business experience. Its tools allow us to access and leverage the most granular level of information and most relevant historical data."

"We were among the first to identify the massive potential Opensee's platform offered in taking trade analytics to the next level."

Tier 1 Global Asset Manager
